deepReview.summary: Plan is scoped to local advisory measurement and Beads backlog-only pilot state, reusing existing hooks, state, execution ledgers, workflow health, doctor gates, Codex RTK coverage, local project config, and research artifacts.

reviewPhases.disposition: The plan answers the business question with automated keep/drop evidence, deterministic thresholds, advisory first-week verdicts, and no tracked private project inventory.
The plan extends existing local observation and health surfaces, adds explicit baseline and Codex import commands, and avoids creating a second telemetry stack.
The weekly revisit path is a command and JSON summary with exact evidence counts, not manual log reading.

The main noise risks are captured as fixtures: late CodeGraph use, duplicate Beads state, insufficient data, raw Codex transcript ingestion, tracked private project inventory, and private-content leakage.
Beads is limited to backlog and dependency state before or between ETRNL runs, not planning, execution truth, or future issue-tracker truth.
Existing hook observation, state, ledgers, workflow-health, Codex RTK tests, and doctor gates are the reuse base.
The plan keeps one measurement script plus small hook, Codex-import, and workflow-health extensions; other starred-repo ideas remain patterns to steal, not always-on tools.

skillMatrix.trigger: user requested a saved base plan and follow-up improvements
skillMatrix.evidence: Plan follows the file-backed ETRNL planning workflow and passed plan-readiness in draft mode before finalization.

skillMatrix.trigger: future implementation creates a new summarizer and hook classifications
skillMatrix.evidence: Plan requires keeping the aggregator small and reusing workflow-health, hook state, execution ledger, and Codex RTK parsing where possible.

skillMatrix.trigger: future implementation may duplicate ledger or workflow-health parsing
skillMatrix.evidence: Run during implementation if helper logic overlaps existing parsers.

skillMatrix.trigger: future implementation changes workflow enforcement or public control-plane docs
skillMatrix.evidence: Use only if broad enforcement changes are made.

skillMatrix.trigger: planning-only markdown and JSON artifact work in this turn
skillMatrix.evidence: No TypeScript source is changed by this planning artifact.
skillMatrix.notApplicableRationale: No exported or public types, API contracts, runtime validation, generated types, state machines, branded IDs, reusable type utilities, or cross-layer DTO boundaries are touched.

decisions.reuseDecision: Create one bounded aggregator while reusing hook state, ledgers, workflow-health filters, Codex RTK coverage, and doctor gates.
decisions.newSurfaceJustification: No existing script computes keep, enforce, repo-specific, remove-watch, or insufficient-data verdicts across Claude/Codex tool usage and workflow outcomes.

decisions.reuseDecision: Extend existing observer classifications instead of adding another hook.
Expose optional effectiveness summaries through existing status and doctor commands.
Create a synthetic tracked template for the local project registry instead of committing private project names or paths.
decisions.newSurfaceJustification: The pilot needs all continuous projects, but this public repo cannot track Victor-specific project inventory.

completionAudit.evidence: Final plan and deep-stack artifact capture automatic local measurement, Codex and Claude evidence paths, Beads backlog-only pilot scope, local continuous-project config, deterministic thresholds, and advisory-only first-week verdicts.

tddEvidence.rationaleWhenNotTestFirst: This turn creates a plan and validation artifact; implementation tests are specified in the plan's test-first execution section.

completionReconciliation.requestedOutcome: Plan a failsafe automated way to track which additions are worth keeping without manual checking.
completionReconciliation.evidence: Plan specifies sanitized local effectiveness events, fixture validation, baseline capture, Codex import, weekly summarize command, workflow-health projection, exact threshold verdicts, and advisory first-week verdicts.

completionReconciliation.requestedOutcome: Decide whether Beads adds value alongside etrnl-dev-plan, etrnl-autoplan, and etrnl-execute.
completionReconciliation.evidence: Plan defines Beads as backlog, dependency, claim, blocker, and discovered-follow-up state only, not plan, execution, or future issue-tracker truth.

completionReconciliation.requestedOutcome: Incorporate no GitHub issue usage, all continuous projects, and advisory-only revisit behavior.
completionReconciliation.evidence: Assumptions, Group E, phases, local project registry boundary, verification, readiness report, and verdict reflect those decisions.

reuseBindings.decision: Plan one dedicated effectiveness aggregator and reuse existing observation, Codex RTK, and health surfaces.
reuseBindings.newSurfaceJustification: Existing surfaces record workflow state but do not produce tool-level keep/drop verdicts for CodeGraph, Beads, or stolen hook patterns across both Claude and Codex.

sourceGate.evidence: This turn finalizes a plan and artifact; source implementation gates are listed in the plan.

riskTier.reason: The future implementation touches hooks, workflow scripts, Codex import, tests, and docs, but this artifact is planning-only and live findings stay advisory in the first week.
